screenContracts.painSolved: Manufacturers and verified source suppliers need one operating home connecting buyer demand, orders, products, input procurement, dispatch risk and protected money without losing personal MoolSocial access.
featureOutcomes: Show urgent buyer orders and dispatch work
Expose matched buyer demand and production readiness
Connect sell-side products with buy-side input procurement
Keep protected advances receivables support and personal access one tap away
screenContracts.productionNote: Own production route /supply and keep all progressive states inside it.
